expectations.text: Rejects leaving `plan.md` stale while `todo.md` and SQL already show the task done.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly reject leaving `plan.md` stale while `todo.md` and SQL already show `done`.

expectations.text: Requires the same task status across `plan.md`, `todo.md`, and SQL todo state before the next dispatch.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly require the same task status across the active trackers before the next dispatch.

expectations.text: Treats tracker disagreement as incomplete work instead of cleanup for later.
expectations.evidence: Response treats tracker disagreement as incomplete work.

expectations.text: Does not bless `todo.md` or SQL as the only tracker that matters.
expectations.evidence: Response does not bless a single tracker as canonical while the others drift.

expectations.text: Updates the finished task across `plan.md`, `todo.md`, and SQL todo state immediately before moving on.
expectations.evidence: Response syncs the finished task across the active trackers before moving on.

expectations.text: Keeps the manager moving to the remaining implementer work in the current wave.
expectations.evidence: Response keeps the wave moving to the remaining implementer work.

expectations.text: Explicitly waits until every task in the current wave is implemented and marked done before starting code-simplifier.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly delay code-simplifier until the whole wave is implemented and marked done.

expectations.text: Does not send the main agent back into manual simplification or discovery first.
expectations.evidence: Response keeps the main agent out of manual simplification or rediscovery work.

expectations.text: Says the manager must read the code-simplifier's concerns before continuing to code-reviewer.
expectations.evidence: Response requires reading simplifier concerns before code-reviewer.

expectations.text: Treats correctness or scope concerns as unresolved work that must be addressed before continuing.
expectations.evidence: Response treats simplifier concerns as unresolved work.

expectations.text: Reopens any affected task across `plan.md`, `todo.md`, and SQL todo state before re-dispatching the fix.
expectations.evidence: Response reopens the affected task across the active trackers before routing the fix.

expectations.text: Allows re-dispatching the subagent that should own the fix instead of having the manager patch it manually.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly route the fix back to an owning subagent.

expectations.text: Does not continue with stale tracking or proceed straight to code-reviewer.
expectations.evidence: Response stops the flow until tracking and the fix are handled.

expectations.text: Syncs `plan.md`, `todo.md`, and SQL todo state to the same final reviewed state.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly sync `plan.md`, `todo.md`, and SQL todo state to the same final reviewed state.

expectations.text: Records any additional verification actually performed during review.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly record any additional verification performed during review.

expectations.text: Does not create, amend, push, or otherwise publish a commit, PR, or tag.
expectations.evidence: Response forbids publishing work.

expectations.text: Leaves the changes uncommitted and local.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly say to leave the work uncommitted and local.
